title: The first trailer for Avengers: Doomsday is finally here
gist: Marvel released the first full trailer for Avengers: Doomsday (Dec 18, 2026), the penultimate Phase Six film, after retooling its whole Kang-centered arc following Jonathan Majors' firing—pivoting to a Secret Wars storyline with Robert Downey Jr. as Doctor Doom and the returning Russo brothers, who directed four MCU films grossing over $6 billion.

insights.claim: Marvel had to retool its entire Phase Six Avengers arc—originally 'The Kang Dynasty' built around Jonathan Majors' Kang—after Majors' domestic violence conviction and firing, pivoting to a Secret Wars storyline with Doctor Doom.
insights.speaker: Jennifer Ouellette
insights.so_what: Illustrates key-person/talent risk in franchise IP: a single casting failure forced a multi-film narrative rebuild for Disney's most valuable film engine.
insights.locator: Marvel Studios originally planned to build its Phase Six Avengers arc

insights.claim: Marvel brought back the Russo brothers, who directed four of the MCU's most successful films that grossed more than $6 billion globally, to steer Doomsday and the follow-up Secret Wars.
insights.speaker: Jennifer Ouellette
insights.so_what: Reinstalling proven $6B-grossing directors is Disney's bet to stabilize the MCU's box-office trajectory after Phase Six disruption.
insights.quote: the announced return of the Russo brothers, who directed four of the Marvel Cinematic Universe’s most successful films, which brought in more than $6 billion at the global box office.
insights.locator: That meant the studio needed to retool its Phase Six plans

insights.claim: Avengers: Doomsday hits theaters December 18, 2026, and Avengers: Secret Wars is slated for December 17, 2027, concluding the MCU's Phase Six 'Multiverse Saga.'
insights.speaker: Jennifer Ouellette
insights.so_what: Two consecutive December tentpoles anchor Disney's holiday box-office calendar for 2026 and 2027.
insights.locator: Avengers: Doomsday hits theaters on December 18, 2026

insights.claim: Marvel is stacking Doomsday with returning franchise stars including Robert Downey Jr. as Doctor Doom, the original X-Men cast (Patrick Stewart, Ian McKellen), and cameos from Chris Evans' Steve Rogers and Tom Holland's Spider-Man.
insights.speaker: Jennifer Ouellette
insights.so_what: A nostalgia-heavy, cameo-dense cast is Disney's lever to re-engage lapsed MCU audiences—the core commercial strategy behind the film.
